news.t: Expanding the Suite: Harbor Launches Active Commodity ETF
'The story is all about gold.' ETF experts on commodity-based strategies
NEUBERGER BERMAN COMMODITY STRATEGY FUND CONVERTS TO ACTIVE ETF

overview.description: The Neuberger Commodity Strategy ETF (NBCM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg Commodity index. The fund is actively managed to provide long and short exposure to the broad commodity market. The fund utilizes a subsidiary to invest in commodity-linked derivative instruments. NBCM was launched on Aug 27, 2012 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.

data.title: 'The story is all about gold.' ETF experts on commodity-based strategies
data.text: While deflationary pressures have stripped precious metals and mining stocks of their luster, flows into certain commodity-based funds continue to accrue.
